home.badge: Now available in Norwegian and English
home.headline: Build with certainty.
home.subheading: Bricks helps construction companies, architects, and engineers create documentation that meets city codes and legal requirements — with AI-powered compliance checks built in.

documents.title: Document management
documents.description: Upload drawings, create proposals, and track every version — with a full audit trail from draft to approved.

compliance.title: AI compliance checks
compliance.description: Instantly check your documents against Norwegian city codes and legal requirements before submitting.

collaboration.title: Team collaboration
collaboration.description: Architects, engineers, and carpenters work together in structured review and approval workflows.

upload.title: Upload or create
upload.description: Upload existing files or write documents directly in Bricks.

check.title: AI checks it
check.description: Compliance issues are flagged automatically against relevant regulations.

review.title: Team reviews
review.description: Submit for review, gather feedback, and get sign-off from your team.

submit.title: Submit with confidence
submit.description: Send to authorities knowing your documentation is complete and compliant.

cta2.heading: Ready to get compliant?
cta2.body: Join construction teams across Norway using Bricks to get their documentation right, every time.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your email and password to access your projects.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Join Bricks to manage your construction documentation.

error.alreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
error.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
error.generic: Could not create account. Please try again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Construction projects you belong to
projects.empty: You don't have any projects yet.

card.title: Project details
card.description: Fill in the details for your construction project.

fields.name: Project name *
fields.orgNameHint: Used to group your projects. Ignored if you already have an organization.

placeholders.name: Oslofjord Residential Block A
placeholders.description: Brief description of the project scope…
placeholders.orgName: Your company name (created on first project)

error.generic: Could not create project. Please try again.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Archiving hides the project from the dashboard. All data is preserved.
dangerZone.confirm: Archive this project? It will be hidden from the dashboard.

generateWithAi.title: Generate with AI
generateWithAi.description: Describe your project and Claude generates a compliant first draft in seconds, referencing Norwegian building regulations.

blank.title: Blank document
blank.description: Start with an empty rich-text editor. You can upload files from the project page.

generateDocument.title: Generate document
generateDocument.description: Describe your project and Claude will generate a compliant first draft referencing Norwegian building regulations.

fields.title: Document title
fields.scopePlaceholder: Describe what you are building — purpose, location, context…
fields.specsPlaceholder: e.g. 3 floors, 450 m² footprint, timber frame, 12 residential units…

status.ready: Draft ready — you can edit it now

invalidLink.title: Invalid invitation link
invalidLink.description: This link is missing an invitation token. Please use the link from your invitation email.

join.title: Accept invitation
join.description: You've been invited to join a project on Bricks. Click below to accept and get access.
